ratchets.purpose: Give cold agents a compact route from changed files to policy modules and gates.
ratchets.claimBoundary: Orientation only; gate execution, CI state, review state, and merge readiness remain separate lanes.
ratchets.nextMove: Use this route before loading broad codestyle or governance context.

ratchets.purpose: Turn a run into a compact resumed-agent handoff instead of a transcript dump.
ratchets.claimBoundary: Distillation summarizes local orientation and does not prove CI, review, tracker, or merge readiness.
ratchets.nextMove: Attach session-distill/v1 to PR closeout and resumed-agent handoff flows.

ratchets.purpose: Expose retry, stop, ownership, and next-action state as data.
ratchets.claimBoundary: Rework evidence explains local recovery state and does not make delivery or merge claims.
ratchets.nextMove: Promote repeated recovery patterns into validators, tests, or tracked exceptions.

ratchets.purpose: Make reviewer outcomes explicit enough for coordinators to route accept, object, defer, and blocked states.
ratchets.claimBoundary: Reviewer decisions are review evidence only; PR closeout still owns merge-readiness synthesis.
ratchets.nextMove: Require typed reviewer outcomes before treating review coverage as satisfied.

ratchets.purpose: Classify governance docs by whether they feed runtime decisions, operator policy, history, or archive candidates.
ratchets.claimBoundary: Governance classification is routing metadata; it cannot override source docs or validation results.
ratchets.nextMove: Use this surface to prune governance that does not feed a decision or durable policy.
